mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE_OUT ( ATT_OUT_ID, EMP_ID, ATT_OUT_START_DT, ATT_OUT_RSN ) VALUES ( SEQ_ATT_OUT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{empId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{attOutRsn} )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO ATTENDANCE_WORK_STATUS T USING DUAL ON (T.EMP_ID = #{empId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.ATT_WORK_STTS = '외출' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (EMP_ID, ATT_WORK_STTS) VALUES (#{empId}, '외출')

UPDATE ATTENDANCE_OUT SET ATT_OUT_END_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ATT_OUT_TIME = ROUND((CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(ATT_OUT_START_DT AS DATE)) * 24 * 60, 0) WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND ATT_OUT_END_DT IS NULL AND ATT_OUT_ID = ( SELECT MAX(ATT_OUT_ID) FROM ATTENDANCE_OUT WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND ATT_OUT_END_DT IS NULL )

MERGE INTO ATTENDANCE_WORK_STATUS T USING DUAL ON (T.EMP_ID = #{empId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.ATT_WORK_STTS = '복귀' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (EMP_ID, ATT_WORK_STTS) VALUES (#{empId}, '복귀')
